title: Emergency Relief & Disaster Response
subtitle: Immediate aid in crisis
description: NTHF provides immediate assistance to communities affected by conflict, natural disasters, and other crises. THF delivers customized food parcels, clean water, shelter materials, medical supplies, and essential non-food items to help families survive and recover.

title: Food Security
subtitle: Hunger Relief
description: NTHF combats hunger and malnutrition through regular food distributions and nutritional support for families. NTHF promotes long-term food sustainability to strengthen community resilience.

hero.title: Food Security
hero.heading: Feeding Families In Need
hero.overlayText: Ensuring every family has access to nutritious food and a healthier future.

overview.title: Give the Gift of Food Security
overview.content: As a monthly donor, you become part of a powerful initiative that ensures vulnerable families have access to nutritious meals and essential support. Every day, your generosity provides hope, comfort, and nourishment to those facing hunger and displacement.
overview.additionalText: For $100 a month, you can provide a family of seven with a customized food parcel filled with nutritious foods that will sustain them for one month. No one should go to bed hungry — yet millions do. Your support helps change that reality.

impactStats.label: People around the world face chronic malnutrition.
People go to bed hungry every night.
People face hunger due to crises and conflicts.

priorities.title: Our Priorities
priorities.description: Humanitarian crises have grown dramatically over the past decade. Wars, conflicts, natural disasters, and climate change continue to worsen food insecurity worldwide. Our mission focuses on providing immediate food assistance while building long-term resilience within communities.

initiatives.title: Baby Formula Program
initiatives.description: This initiative provides life-saving baby formula to infants who have lost access to breast milk or safe food due to displacement or conflict. By supplying nutritious formula and feeding support to families, we prevent malnutrition and strengthen infant health.

initiatives.title: Monthly Food Parcels
initiatives.description: Our teams and partners deliver essential food parcels to families living in extreme poverty and refugee communities. Each parcel provides enough nutritious food to sustain a family for an entire month.

initiatives.title: Fighting Hunger in Emergencies
initiatives.description: During humanitarian crises, we distribute emergency food packages including vegetable bags, flour bags, bread, and meat supplies to families affected by disasters, conflict, and displacement.

initiatives.title: Community Kitchens (Tikkiyat)
initiatives.description: Our community kitchens provide daily hot meals to displaced families. These kitchens operate in safe locations such as schools and shelters, delivering nutritious dishes including rice, beans, lentils, soups, chicken, and bulgur.

kitchenImpact.title: Bringing Warm Meals and Hope
kitchenImpact.description: Through six active community kitchens, thousands of displaced families receive warm meals every day. These kitchens have become an essential lifeline for families facing severe food insecurity.

impactMessage.title: Your Impact
impactMessage.content: Every dollar you contribute directly supports families struggling with hunger. Your donations help keep community kitchens running, distribute food parcels, and deliver life-saving nutrition to vulnerable families.

title: Water, Sanitation & Hygiene (WASH)
subtitle: Access to clean water & hygiene
description: NTHF provides safe, dignified and protective shelter and water access for displaced families and vulnerable communities affected by conflict and disasters.

title: Health
subtitle: Restoring health & medical support
description: NTHF sends shipments of medical supplies to countries in crisis ensuring families in need can access essential treatment and healthcare services.

title: Shelter
subtitle: Providing safe durable housing
description: NTHF provides safe, dignified and protective shelter for displaced families and vulnerable communities affected by conflict or disasters.

title: Child Protection & Widow Family Assistance
subtitle: Safeguarding vulnerable children
description: NTHF supports orphaned and vulnerable children with education, healthcare, nutrition and psychosocial care ensuring every child grows safely.

title: Education
subtitle: Access to learning and self-reliance
description: NTHF provides access to quality education, school supplies and vocational training opportunities to empower youth and adults.

title: Faith-based Giving
subtitle: Bringing relief & joy
description: NTHF provides seasonal support including Ramadan food baskets, Eid gifts and Qurbani meat distribution to help families celebrate important occasions.

title: Livelihoods & Women Empowerment
subtitle: Empowering communities to thrive
description: NTHF focuses on empowering vulnerable communities by helping individuals build sustainable livelihoods and economic independence.
